ogTitle: Marnoo vs Marnoo West: Climate Safety

heading: Marnoo vs Marnoo West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marnoo, Victoria and Marnoo West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Marnoo (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marnoo or Marnoo West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marnoo has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Marnoo West scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marnoo scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Marnoo West scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marnoo or Marnoo West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
